headline: Is The Home Depot, Inc. (HD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is HD a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on The Home Depot, Inc. on MaxDividends’s Substack by Serhio MaxDividends. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on HD. The Home Depot, Inc.’s share was trading at $340.16 as of April 23rd. HD’s trailing and forward P/E were 23.90 and 22.73 […]

headline: The Bull Case For Home Depot (HD) Could Change Following Wren Kitchens’ Abrupt Bankruptcy Fallout
summary: In early May 2026, Home Depot was hit by the abrupt Chapter 7 bankruptcy of partner Wren Kitchens, which suddenly shut its U.S. operations and left customers facing stalled deliveries, refund challenges, and state investigations while Home Depot assessed how to respond. This disruption highlights how reliance on third‑party installers and in‑store studio partners can create operational and reputational risks that extend well beyond product sales. We’ll now explore how the Wren Kitchens...
